pageContext.name: Charlie Brown (Red Shirt)
pageContext.description: It's that round-headed kid, Charlie Brown, in his red shirt as seen in Charles Schulz's Vintage Era Peanuts comic strips! Bring the original anti-hero home with this 16' Supersize Charlie Brown premium vinyl figure featuring real soft goods clothing, including his red polo shirt with its signature black zig-zag and black shorts. Poseable with five points of articulation, Supersize Charlie Brown comes packaged in a collector-friendly box featuring the original Peanuts comic strips that inspired this design. An excellent companion for your vintage-style Supersize Snoopy figure!
